Arizona-Based Hormone Therapy, Aesthetics & Regenerative Medicine for Men & Women
Aging can cause rapid body changes, from that diminishing youthful glow to the loss of energy and libido, to name just a few. What have the transitions of life taken from
you
?
At Balance Hormone Center in Gilbert, Scottsdale and Chandler, Arizona, we offer hormone replacement therapy, aesthetics and regenerative medicine to help you get back to feeling your best.
Reverse the Symptoms of Aging With Hormone Replacement Therapy
As early as the age of 30, men will begin to experience a
decline in testosterone
, resulting in decreased libido, memory loss and loss of muscle mass. Women experience
hormone imbalances
such as elevated or decreased estrogen levels, which can result in hot flashes, decreased libido and mood swings.
The best way to improve these symptoms is through hormone therapy. Balance Hormone Center offers a wide range of treatment options to help you feel younger and get you back to enjoying the things that matter most.
Feel Good From the Inside Out With Aesthetics
Aging doesn’t only affect you on the inside. It can take a toll on your skin, result in unwanted body hair and leave you with new scars. Our
aesthetics services
help reduce the signs of aging, including wrinkles, volume loss and discoloration. Take advantage of services such as:
Facial Fillers
Laser Hair Removal
Lip Fillers
Tattoo Removal
Acne Treatment
Restore Your Body With Regenerative Medicine
Over time, many of us suffer injuries or illnesses that permanently damage our critical organs and tissues. These medical issues can result in debilitating symptoms such as pain and swelling—symptoms that threaten to reduce your quality of life.
Regenerative medicine can help restore your body from the inside out. By harnessing the power of your body’s natural healing process, we can target specific areas of your body that need additional care. Our regenerative medicine services include:
Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide (NAD+)
Take Back Your Health With Balance Hormone Center
At Balance Hormone Center, we’re proud to help our patients get their balance back. Whether you need relief from diabetes or want to improve your self-confidence, we’re here to support you. During your first appointment, we’ll go over all of your treatment options to help you choose a path that’s right for you.
Our team is dedicated to helping you experience full-body health again. To learn more about our services, to schedule an appointment in Gilbert, Scottsdale or Chandler, Arizona or for answers to your questions, give us a call at
(480) 718-9960
.
What Our Clients Say
“This place is a Godsend. So grateful to Dr Cafaro for his expertise & time he takes to explain everything & address all my questions. He is awesome. I feel so good since getting hormones all figured out. I have much more energy & just feel healthy. The office staff are very kind & easy to deal with. Great place. So happy I found them.”

About Us

About Balance Hormone Center
Balance Hormone Center has three locations in Gilbert, Scottsdale and Chandler, Arizona. We specialize in hormone replacement therapy for men and women, and it is our goal to get you feeling your best. Schedule an appointment today and one of our healthcare professionals can determine if you are a candidate and what steps you need to take to start feeling a better quality of life.

WHY BALANCE?
Are you:
Unable to think clearly or mentally function as you did 20 years ago?
Fatigued and easily wiped out?
Longing for improved sexual performance and libido?
Unable to gain muscle mass no matter how hard or long you exercise?
Gaining weight despite repeated attempts at dieting?
Experiencing skin changes, thinning hair and brittle nails, cold tolerance?
Having erectile dysfunction?
Having hot flashes?
In menopause or andropause and desire a natural approach
in hormone replacement therapy?
Interested in being protected against age related heart disease,
stroke, diabetes, elevated cholesterol?
Still feeling lousy despite changing your diet and exercising more
and don’t know where else to turn?
Getting Your Balance Back
In the prime of your life, your endocrine hormones work in perfect harmony with one another and all the body’s systems to keep you healthy, vibrant and performing at your peak. When hormones become imbalances, as they do in perimenopause and andropause, that’s when the body may begin to decline. Adult onset diabetes, coronary disease, osteoporosis, and a host of other aging-related diseases, flourish in a body that is out of balance. The physicians at Balance Hormone Center work with you to discuss your symptoms, evaluate your hormone levels, and determine how hormone therapy may improve your health and quality of life
. By being on an appropriate hormone replacement program, eating a healthy diet, and exercising with a trainer supervised exercise routine, you will look and feel better than you have in years.
Contact Balance Hormone Center
